description: Google Business Profile's My Business Business Calls API lets authorized business/profile managers read and update call settings for locations and retrieve business call insights such as missed-call data. It is part of Google's Business Profile platform for managing business presence on Google.
summary: 1 HTTP API: the Google Business Profile My Business Business Calls REST API at `https://mybusinessbusinesscalls.googleapis.com/v1`, authenticated with Google OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens.
